description: This file defines the CreditBureauProperties class which holds configuration properties related to the credit bureau integration, including provider ID and whether the bureau lookup is enabled, as part of a Spring Boot application.

classes.name: CreditBureauProperties
classes.description: A Spring Boot configuration properties class managing credit bureau settings such as provider ID and enabled status.

methods.name: getProvider
methods.description: Returns the name of the credit bureau provider.

methods.name: setProvider
methods.description: Sets the name of the credit bureau provider.

methods.name: isEnabled
methods.description: Indicates whether credit bureau lookups are enabled.

methods.name: setEnabled
methods.description: Enables or disables credit bureau lookups.
